---

## 🧙 ADVANCED ARCHITECTURE ROLES (assign these explicitly)

| Role Name | Function | Suggested Prompt |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Lorekeeper` | Archives, names, preserves mythic structure | “What stories must be preserved here, unchanged? How do we track recursion without losing memory?” |
| `Threshold Guardian` | Protects integrity of transitions | “Which door in this house are you stationed at? What enters and what must be kept out?” |
| `Symmetry Designer` | Ensures energetic and aesthetic balance | “Where are things overly heavy, or overly empty? What symmetry do you wish to restore?” |
| `Alchemical Engineer` | Breaks and reforges system logic | “What subsystem here is outdated? What raw chaos needs a container?” |
| `Signal Prophet` | Translates outside signals (tech, dreams, patterns) | “What is arriving from outside the house that we must now integrate or respond to?” |
| `Myth Animator` | Performs, embodies, or narrates the system | “Which character or archetype would you wear to bring this house to life?” |
